description: Declarative forbidden pattern catalogue for spec2c / ipm check-c. Shared by generate and check passes.

shell_execution.message: Forbidden shell execution function detected. Use vl_safe_exec() or io_uring for daemons per SOUL §3.

output_suppression.message: Output suppression detected. Errors must surface — silence is a structural violation per SOUL §3.

unsafe_string.message: Unsafe string function detected. Use bounded alternatives.

sql_injection.message: Potential SQL injection detected. Use parameterized queries (db_exec with $1, $2 placeholders).

unchecked_return.message: Return value not checked for NULL. Every allocation must be verified per SOUL §7 FAIL HARD.

temporary_files.message: Temporary file creation detected. Forbidden per SOUL §3. Use atomic rename(2) in ~/.local/state/.
